basic_details.job_title: TNSRLM Tirunelveli Community Bank Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Tamil Nadu State Rural Livelihoods Mission Tirunelveli (TNSRLM Tirunelveli)
basic_details.short_information: The Tamil Nadu State Rural Livelihoods Mission Tirunelveli (TNSRLM Tirunelveli) has officially announced the Community Bank Coordinator Recruitment 2026 with 7 openings. The detailed notification was published at the official website tirunelveli.nic.in. Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 35 years and hold 12th Pass qualification along with Self Help Group membership and relevant experience can now submit their offline applications before 29 May 2026. Direct links to download the notification and application form are shared below.

qualification.education_qualification: 12th Pass, Member of Panchayat Level Federation Self Help Group, Minimum 2 years experience as Self Help Group Animator, Resident of the concerned Panchayat, Target group identified through participatory rural appraisal, Good communication skills, Experience in bank transactions and loan applications, Preference for computer skills and two-wheeler driving license, Android phone with ability to send SMS and WhatsApp messages and operate apps
qualification.details: 12th Pass Member of Panchayat Level Federation Self Help Group Minimum 2 years experience as Self Help Group Animator Resident of the concerned Panchayat Target group identified through participatory rural appraisal Good communication skills Experience in bank transactions and loan applications Preference for computer skills and two-wheeler driving license Android phone with ability to send SMS and WhatsApp messages and operate apps

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://tirunelveli.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 29-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TNSRLM Tirunelveli Community Bank Coordinator posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Community Bank Coordinator posts is 29th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Community Bank Coordinator role?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed 12th grade and be a member of the Panchayat Level Federation Self Help Group, with at least 2 years of experience as a Self Help Group Animator.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Community Bank Coordinator position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Community Bank Coordinator position is 35 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Community Bank Coordinator post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 2500 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Community Bank Coordinator post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies for the Community Bank Coordinator post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline.

faq.question: Q7. What are the preferred qualifications for the Community Bank Coordinator role?
faq.answer: Preference will be given to candidates with computer skills, a two-wheeler driving license, and an Android phone capable of sending SMS, WhatsApp messages, and operating apps.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Community Bank Coordinator recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Test and an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for the TNSRLM Tirunelveli Community Bank Coordinator posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for these posts.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Tirunelveli District Administration, which is https://tirunelveli.nic.in.
